blocks.text: Glimt fly to Lisbon — and Ødegaard's out for Arsenal's shootout
Cameron Young claimed THE PLAYERS at -13; Hovland finished T20 at -6. Monday has two forgettable matches. Tuesday is a different beast entirely.

Perfectly level on aggregate, Bodø/Glimt travel to Lisbon for a winner-takes-all CL second leg. NRK confirms Ødegaard misses Arsenal's equally finely-poised tie — Norway's Tuesday just got layered with drama.

items: ⚽ Manchester City vs Real Madrid — Europe's great rivalry, perfectly poised on aggregate
⚽ Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain — Stamford Bridge on edge, nothing separates them
